faq:
Frequently Asked Questions
Please reach us at
if you cannot find the answer to your question.
When MEGALODOME GOLF will be open?
We are in the financing process, our objective is to open at the fall of 2027.
Where will be your first location?
In Oswego, IL
What will be the cost to play a nine hole?
Our pricing is currently not finalized and will vary by season.
What are the operating hours of MEGALODOME GOLF?
We will be open from 6am-midnight Central Time, every day.
Is there a pro shop at MEGALODOME GOLF?
Yes, we have a fully stocked pro shop offering a wide selection of equipment for both rental and purchase (including left- and right-handed options), along with apparel for men and women and a variety of accessories.
Does MEGALODOME GOLF have a dress code?
Men: A collared shirt paired with shorts or slacks and spikeless golf shoes (no sneakers).
Women: Tailored shorts or pants with a blouse, polo shirt, or casual top, or golf attire such as a golf skirt and polo shirt. White denim pants are also acceptable for women. Spikeless golf shoes are required.
Copyright © 2026 MEGALODOME GOLF - All Rights Reserved.

index:
MEGALODOME GOLF
"THE NEXT REVOLUTION"™
The world’s first REAL indoor golf experience!
VIDEO
Click on the video to see
MEGALODOME GOLF "
THE NEXT REVOLUTION
"™
Introduction to MEGALODOME GOLF
The world’s first indoor golf experience that replicates “traditional golf course”
We offer an innovative and immersive golfing experience that allows players to enjoy the sport year-round (regardless of weather conditions). Our state-of-the-art facilities feature a meticulously designed golf course that provides a truly exceptional & fun golfing experience for players of all skill levels.  Our executive 9-hole course is a par 30 and is comprised of:
Six (6) par 3 holes
Three (3) par 4 holes
Par 3 Holes
Multifaceted Practice Facility
Par 3 Holes
The lengths of the par 3s will vary from 100 to 160 yards, including undulating greens well protected by bunkers and water hazards. Golf course design prepared by renowned golf architects Huxham Golf Design Inc.
Par 4 Holes
Multifaceted Practice Facility
Par 3 Holes
The Arizona-style golf course will feature three par-4 holes, each measuring between 270 and 280 yards. Strategically placed water hazards and bunkers will provide strong defenses, making it challenging to reach the green in a single stroke—an opportunity reserved for only the longest hitters.
Multifaceted Practice Facility
The fourth dome is a fully equipped practice facility featuring 50 stalls and extending over 275 yards.
Golfers can practice with every club in their bag while observing precise yardages and ball trajectories.
We will also have several stations with advanced simulator software.
Additionally, the short game area includes a chipping green with bunkers and a putting green, allowing players to refine both their short game and overall swing.
The short game area will include a chipping green with bunkers and a putting green enabling golfers to improve their short game in addition to their swing.
Investors informations
MEGALODOME GOLF flyer 2026
Download PDF
Copyright © 2026 MEGALODOME GOLF - All Rights Reserved.

more-on-megalodome-golf:
MEGALODOME GOLF is also:
The World's First
The world’s first indoor golf experience to truly replicate “traditional golf” is set to revolutionize the sport.
This stunning Scottsdale, Arizona-style course is housed within the three largest domes in North America.
Experience
A stunning course featuring lakes, waste bunkers, and undulating greens, designed by renowned international golf architects.
Golfers will enjoy an elevated sensory experience, surrounded by the presence of cacti, palm trees, and four distinct types of artificial turf throughout the course.
Our Course
This executive 9-hole golf course features 6 par-3 holes and 3 par-4 holes, with a total par of 30.
The fourth dome serves as a full practice facility, offering 50 driving stalls and extending over 275 yards. Golfers will be able to practice with every club in their bag while being able to track exact yardages and ball trajectories. The facility will also include chipping greens with sand traps and a putting green, allowing for year-round practice of the full golf game—365 days a year!
This venue will be ideal for colleges, universities, and sport-study programs, offering a place to enhance their skills all year long.
Imagine the Possibilities
All aspects of the game of golf can be practiced year-round in a controlled, ideal temperature.
Imagine being able to hone your skills in your favorite sport, year-round, under perfect conditions from 6:00 AM to midnight.
Copyright © 2026 MEGALODOME GOLF - All Rights Reserved.

our-location:
Features at Our Location:
Par 30 Executive Golf Course located inside three proprietary domes.  Arizona Layout has six par 3s and three par 4s
A multifaceted golf academy with a full service 275 yard driving range, practice greens, practice bunkers & other short-game areas to really sharpen your wedge game
Controlled temperature
Well lit up at night
Cool Arizona vibe
Ability to play golf year-round
High-end Clubhouse featuring an amazing bar area, fully stocked pro shop, cloakroom, and office space
Copyright © 2026 MEGALODOME GOLF - All Rights Reserved.
Privacy Policy
Powered by
our-mission:
MEGALODOME GOLF'S UNIQUE EXPERIENCE:
Weathered Climate all Year-Round
Our initial focus is on extending the golf season in colder climates,
transforming a short 3- to 6-month golf period to a full 12-month.
However, with average temperatures steadily rising over the past decade,
we see a significant opportunity to enable year-round play in warmer regions as well
(where temperatures frequently exceed 90°F and can reach up to 130°F in extreme cases.)
Arizona Style Golf Course
Unique, fun and immersive experience for all ages and all levels:
At our first location in Chicago, golfers will feel as if they've been transported to Scottsdale, AZ —
even in the heart of winter! For the first time, a true golf
experience is available in a cutting-edge, fully immersive indoor environment.
Shorter Rounds
Shortening the amount of time required to play.  The average 9 hole round is expected to take only 90 minutes in our domes so a full 18 holes will only take about 3 hours (instead of 5 hours)
Strengthening Business Relationships
Creating an inspirational setting that will facilitate the development of business relationships & promote social interactions
Our advanced artificial greens are designed to replicate the performance of natural grass, allowing players to generate spin on approach shots just as they would on an outdoor course.
Colleges, universities, and sport-study programs will greatly benefit from our state-of-the-art facilities.
Reducing Maintenance Costs
Our maintenance expenses are significantly lower than those of a traditional golf course, as we eliminate the need for mowing, upkeep, and fertilization. This not only makes the game more affordable but also enhances our environmental sustainability.
Enhancing safety with strategically placed protective nets to ensure a secure environment for all golfers.
Copyright © 2026 MEGALODOME GOLF - All Rights Reserved.

privacy-policy:
Privacy Policy
Effective Date: January 1, 2025
At MEGALODOME GOLF USA INC. (“MEGALODOME”, "we," "us," or "our"), we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website (
https://megalodomegolf.com/
(the "Site")). Please read this policy carefully. By using our Site, you consent to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.
1. Information We Collect
We collect personal and non-personal information when you visit our Site, register an account, place an order, or interact with our services. The types of information we may collect include:
•	Personal Information: This includes your name, email address, phone number, shipping address, payment information, and other details you provide when you create an account or complete a transaction.
•	Non-Personal Information: This includes information that is not personally identifiable, such as browser type, device type, IP address, operating system, and browsing behavior on our Site.
•	Cookies and Tracking Technologies: We use cookies, web beacons, and other tracking technologies to improve your experience, analyze usage, and personalize content. You can control cookies through your browser settings.
2. How We Use Your Information
We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
•	To provide and improve our products and services.
•	To process and fulfill your orders.
•	To communicate with you regarding your account, orders, and other requests.
•	To send promotional materials, newsletters, or marketing communications (you can opt-out at any time).
•	To analyze Site usage and improve the functionality of the Site.
•	To comply with legal obligations or resolve disputes.
3. How We Share Your Information
We may share your information with third parties in the following situations:
•	Service Providers: We may share your personal information with third-party vendors and service providers who help us operate the Site and provide services, such as payment processors, shipping companies, and marketing platforms.
•	Legal Compliance: We may disclose your information if required by law, court order, or government regulation, or if necessary to protect the rights, property, or safety of MEGALODOME GOLF USA INC. or its subsidiaries & affiliates, our users, or others.
•	Business Transfers: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of all or part of our business, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction.
4. Data Security
We implement reasonable security measures to protect your personal information. However, please be aware that no data transmission over the internet or electronic storage method is 100% secure. While we strive to protect your personal data, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
5. Your Rights and Choices
•	Access and Update: You have the right to access and update the personal information we hold about you. You can do this by logging into your account or contacting us.
•	Opt-Out: You can opt out of receiving marketing communications by following the unsubscribe link in our emails or contacting us directly.
•	Do Not Track: Some web browsers may transmit "Do Not Track" signals. We do not currently respond to these signals.
6. California Privacy Rights
If you are a California resident, you may have additional rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA). These rights include the ability to request information about the personal data we collect, request deletion of your personal data, and opt-out of the sale of your personal data. To exercise your rights, please contact us at [Insert Contact Information].
7. Children’s Privacy
Our Site is not intended for children under the age of 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that we have collected personal information from a child under 13, we will take steps to delete that information.
8. International Users
If you are accessing the Site from outside the United States, please note that your information may be transferred to and stored in the United States, where our servers are located. By using our Site, you consent to the transfer and processing of your information in the United States.
9. Changes to This Privacy Policy
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we make changes, we will update the effective date at the top of this page. We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any updates.
10. Contact Us
If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:
MEGALODOME GOLF CHICAGO WEST INC.
400 Knoll Street, unit C
Wheaton, IL 60187
872-339-1004
________________________________________
Copyright © 2026 MEGALODOME GOLF - All Rights Reserved.
Privacy Policy
